name: Buff Mo:MOs
description: Buff Momo beloved Nepali dumpling dish filled with seasoned buffalo meat, mixed with spices, onions, and herbs. Steamed or fried, they are served with a spicy tomato-based dipping sauce (achar) and are a popular street Food known for their rich flavor and juicy texture.

description: Chicken Momo are beloved for their delightful taste and are a must-try for anyone exploring Himalayan cuisine!

name: Mutton Khaja Set
description: Mutton Khaja Set is a hearty Nepali meal featuring tender, spiced mutton curry served with beaten rice (chiura), crispy fried snacks, pickles (achar), and salads. Often accompanied by spicy chutneys, it's a flavorful and filling dish, perfect for traditional gatherings and celebrations.
